experiments_kept.change_summary: Created index.html and style.css: sticky nav, hero, scrolling gallery, current programs, past programs grid, stats, get-help, community, footer. All 9 program links. CSS marquee animation (overdelivered Phase 2 scope). Commit cd49383.
experiments_kept.notes: Builder overdelivered: full marquee animation included in Phase 1

experiments_kept.hypothesis: Aesthetic polish: hero dot grid, stats gradient, card accent stripes, year badges, gallery heading
experiments_kept.change_summary: Hero dot grid via ::before pseudo-element. Stats gradient #ec3750→#ff8c37 at 56px. Card accent stripes on Fallout/Stasis/Hackpad. Year badges top-right on all 6 past-program cards. Community CTA gradient button. Gallery heading added. Commit b43f1bd.
experiments_kept.notes: Eval maintained 1.0/1.0; visual quality improved. E2E verified via Playwright screenshot.
